title: Tax' Cave Sky
description: Cave Sky is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to change the clouds for Cave Horror Project menu. It contain the textures to serve the optimized menu style.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/390e5c11016682fab758622192590a1474faa681.png)

Overiew:
Cave Sky is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to change the clouds for Cave Horror Project menu. It contain the textures to serve the optimized menu style.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a223df6a1cf8d53eaaa230a2059d0edb4ef7b20.png)

Cooperation:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack. Try out this amazing pack.
 

Installation:
Just drag and drop the .zip file in the folder located at .mineraft/resourcepacks, or just simply use the Curseforge client.


Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this resourcepasck in your modpack. 


Credit:
Written by Taknax.
